display.name: Magnetosphere Revisited
display.author: prism
display.blurb: A modern take on Robert Hodgin's iTunes visualizer. Soft-light strands trail across the screen leaving glowing wakes, dramatic camera moves, bass-driven bloom on every drop.

annotation.technical_notes: A dense array of custom shapes rendered as metallic, reflective spheres is animated along complex parametric paths. High-decay frame feedback through sampler_main generates persistent, worm-like chrome trails. The visual reacts to the music with dramatic zoom and rotation driven by bass-frequency peaks, eventually engulfing the screen in a chaotic, biomechanical web of specular highlights.
